## What and why

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior has a test; a bug fix has a regression fixture (`tests/fixtures/`)
- [ ] Public-facing changes (CLI flags, `report.json` shape, config keys) are reflected in
      `docs/CLI.md` / `docs/API.md` / `docs/CONFIGURATION.md`
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)

See [docs/CONTRIBUTING.md](../docs/CONTRIBUTING.md) for layering rules and testing conventions.
